Our Facilities

Professional tools and dedicated workspaces for every type of maker.

Become a Member

What We Have

Our square foot facility contains dedicated areas for woodworking, electronics, digital fabrication, and more. All equipment is available to Full Members 24/7.

🪵

Woodworking

A fully equipped woodworking area for furniture, cabinetry, and artistic projects.

  • Table saw
  • Band saw
  • Jointer / Planer
  • Router table
  • Drill press
  • Sanders
  • Hand tools
⚡

Electronics & Prototyping

Workstations for electronics design, repair, and prototyping.

  • Soldering stations
  • Oscilloscopes
  • Multimeters
  • Power supplies
  • Arduino / Raspberry Pi components
  • PCB fabrication tools
🖨️

3D Printing & Fabrication

Digital fabrication tools for turning designs into physical objects.

  • FDM 3D printers
  • Laser cutter / engraver
  • Vinyl cutter
  • Design software workstations
🔩

Metalworking

Equipment for metal cutting, shaping, and joining.

  • Angle grinders
  • MIG welder
  • Metal chop saw
  • Bench vises
  • Hand tools
🎨

Finishing & Painting

Dedicated area for finishing, painting, and surface treatment.

  • Spray area
  • Finishing tools
  • Safety equipment
👥

Community Space

Shared work tables, lounge area, and space for group projects and meetings.

  • Large work tables
  • Whiteboard
  • Projector
  • Kitchen / break area

Safety First

All new members complete a safety orientation before using major equipment. Some tools require additional training. Our experienced members and staff are always available to help.

Want to See It in Person?

Come to an open house and get a guided tour of all our equipment.

Find an Open House View Membership
